summary.lv: Capital AS — IT pakalpojumu uzņēmums — meklē juristu/projektu koordinatoru, kas strādās ar Elektronisko iepirkumu sistēmu (EIS), sagatavos un pārvaldīs juridiskus dokumentus un līgumus, sekos likumdošanas izmaiņām un sadarbosies ar vadību projektu ietvaros.
summary.en: Capital AS — an IT services company — is hiring a Lawyer / Project Coordinator to work with Latvia's Electronic Procurement System (EIS), draft and manage legal documents and contracts, track legislative changes and partner with leadership on projects.
